statement: In every magma, Equation 2237 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (u * v)`) implies Equation 4599 (`(x * x) * y = (x * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0213
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op u v))) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, (op (op x x) y) = (op (op x y) y)
